positive: A minimalist, continuous-line illustration featuring a stylized astronaut floating peacefully through a geometric nebula. The astronaut should have a sleek, clean silhouette, maintaining a strong sense of motion and cosmic wonder. The background nebula should use deep indigo, sapphire blue, and vibrant cyan gradients, contrasted with pops of warm, ethereal yellow and magenta stardust. The composition must be perfectly centered, designed to wrap seamlessly around fabric, utilizing negative space for maximum impact. Vector art style, high contrast, ultra-detailed engraving quality, graphic novel aesthetic, perfect symmetry, clean hard edges, printable on t-shirt fabric, sticker art, Alphonse Mucha meets modern geometric minimalism.
negative: blur, ugly, low quality, noise, text, watermark, signature, cropped, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, malformed hands, bad anatomy, messy, dirty, sketch, photograph, realism, low contrast
